I want to...
Breadcrumb
  1. Home
  2. Departments & Government
  3. Board of Commissioners
  4. Contact the Commissioners

Contact Your Board of Commissioners Office

The Wake County Board of Commissioners welcomes your feedback on County policy and operations.

We encourage residents to make their voice heard during the public comment portion of our regular meetings.

Questions? Contact us at 919-856-6180.

While all County Commissioners reside in a unique geographic district, each Commissioner is elected by, and represents, the entire County.

Below, you can view a map of districts, link to contact forms for the Commissioners and search for your Commissioner by your home address.

Contact your Commissioner

District 1 – Commissioner Don Mial, Chair
District 2 – Commissioner Safiyah Jackson, Vice Chair
District 3 – Commissioner Cheryl Stallings
District 4 – Commissioner Susan Evans
District 5 – Commissioner Tara Waters
District 6 – Commissioner Shinica Thomas
District 7 – Commissioner Vickie Adamson
All Commissioners

Map of Commissioners' Districts

To locate your county commissioner, you have the following options:

  1. Search the Map of Commissioners' Districts by clicking on a district to display its information. You can also pan or zoom on the map or search by address using the search function (the spy glass icon). After entering your address, it will zoom to the specified location.
  2. Alternatively, at the bottom of the page, enter your address in the search bar under the Search by address to find your County Commissioner option.
     

Alt text: The map lists the seven Wake County Board of Commissioners members. Information includes commissioner name, district number, a link to their biography and a link to their contact form.

Note: This tool is provided without warranty. User should consult public primary information sources, such as recorded deeds and plats, to verify the accuracy of the data provided. Wake County shall not be held liable for any errors in these data. This includes but is not limited to errors of omission, commission, errors concerning the content of the data, and relative and positional accuracy of the data. These data cannot be construed to be a legal document. Primary sources from which these data were compiled must be consulted for verification of information contained in these data. Use of this tool constitutes acceptance of this disclaimer.

Search by address to find your County Commissioner

Please note:

  • We request a physical address only to search for your Commissioner by geographic district. Wake County does not retain your address information.
  • We request an email address to respond to your submission. The Commissioners’ Office will respond to this same email address.
  • Once submitted, your name, email address and comment will be a public record.
